overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district. The player moves through neon-lit streets beneath elevated highways, passing towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage in pink, cyan, and green hues. The scene blends natural daylight with intense artificial neon lighting in a dense futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: camera descends from looking up at skyscrapers to street level under the overpass
begins steady forward walking motion along the covered sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway structure, emerging from a narrow passage

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure overhead with geometric support beams
towering futuristic buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
dark commercial building with illuminated signage and metallic surfaces

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with an upward view of towering neon-lit skyscrapers before descending to street level beneath a massive elevated highway. The camera moves through a narrow, sheltered walkway with concrete surfaces, surrounded by dark building facades and the heavy concrete structure of the overpass above.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with commercial storefronts

events.description: emerging from deep shadow into brighter area as the overpass opens up ahead
futuristic vehicle passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, approaching an open intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large commercial building with distinctive green neon trim and vertical lighting strips
tall red traffic light pole with multiple signal lights and pedestrian crossing signs
large red neon sign reading 'CIRUS' on a distant building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, the camera passes a building with distinctive green neon trim on the left. The overpass structure shifts to the left as the view opens up ahead, revealing the red 'CIRUS' neon billboard in the distance. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction, and a futuristic vehicle passes on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open intersection with full sky visibility
crossing the street at the crosswalk with other pedestrians while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection at the crosswalk, moving through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying a cyan holographic face on the building facade
bright green neon sign reading 'YAKUDA' on a commercial building
yellow and white painted crosswalk lines on the asphalt street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a bright, open intersection, the camera crosses the street among moderate pedestrian traffic. The massive cyan holographic face billboard dominates the center view, while the green 'YAKUDA' neon sign glows on the right. The 'CIRUS' billboard shifts to the right as the camera moves through the crosswalk, with futuristic vehicles waiting at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner with weapon shop and digital displays

events.description: turns right at the intersection to follow the sidewalk along the new street
passing by large holographic pink advertisement on the distant tower

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and continuing along the new sidewalk, observing the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the camera on the left

entered.detail: red illuminated sign reading 'RIFLES & PISTOLS' on a storefront
curved concrete ramp of the elevated highway system casting shadows
tall palm tree with red-tinted foliage on the street median

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the intersection, the camera moves along a new sidewalk passing the red 'RIFLES & PISTOLS' storefront sign. The elevated highway ramp curves overhead on the left, while a palm tree stands on the median ahead. The 'YAKUDA' sign recedes into the distance on the left as the camera continues down the commercial street with scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadows of an urban overpass into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial intersection. It begins with a sweeping upward gaze at towering skyscrapers before descending into a narrow, concrete walkway sheltered beneath a massive elevated highway. As the camera moves forward, the oppressive concrete structure shifts to the left, opening the view toward a distant red CIRUS billboard and a passing futuristic vehicle. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the covered sidewalk into a bright intersection, crossing the street beneath a dominant cyan holographic face and a glowing green YAKUDA sign. Finally, the camera turns right, passing a red RIFLES & PISTOLS storefront while the highway ramp curves overhead and the city opens up into a commercial street lined with palm trees.
